entities.empty_chair: an empty chair with a placemat and untouched glass

scenes.title: The Dinner Table
scenes.background_prompt: A dining room with a large wooden table set for four, a chandelier overhead, a window with curtains, and a sideboard with candles. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm dining room in the evening. A large wooden table is set for four people with white plates, folded napkins, and silver cutlery at each place. A father in a collared shirt stands at the head of the table carving a golden-brown roast with a large knife. A mother in a green sweater sits at the side, serving salad from a wooden bowl onto plates. Two seats are occupied, but a third chair at the far end has a full place setting — a plate, a folded napkin, a filled water glass untouched, and a placemat — but no one sitting in it. The chair is pulled out slightly as if someone was expected. A chandelier with warm bulbs glows overhead. A sideboard along the wall holds candles and a basket of bread rolls.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place father at the head of the table, standing and carving a golden-brown roast. Place mother at the side, sitting and serving salad from a bowl. Leave the far end chair empty with a full place setting: plate, napkin, filled water glass, placemat. Chair pulled out slightly.
